expectations.text: True repeating blocks remain as schema.ListNestedBlock or schema.SetNestedBlock
Repeating blocks are NOT wrongly converted to ListNestedAttribute
Reasoning correctly maps SDKv2 TypeSet ↔ framework SetNestedBlock (vs TypeList ↔ ListNestedBlock)
Response justifies why blocks are preserved (HCL syntax / practitioner / backward compatibility)
Schema source contains valid Go (gofmt -e clean)
